title: More Carpets for Llamas
description: Allows you to put more carpet-like items on your llamas
body:
## Description
This mod allows players to equip llamas with additional carpet-like items, expanding their customization options! Now, you can use the following items as decor for your llamas:
- **Moss Carpet**
- **Pale Moss Carpet**
- **Snow**

![all_llamas](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4d2117e2a49d347d81c261864e818b9ba70e57c_0.webp)
## Future Plans
- Support for additional carpet-like blocks.
